title: This New AI Channel Blew Up to 300k Views With 2 Videos

transcript.text: This YouTube channel has posted two videos, made $2,000, and only started two weeks ago. And it's not a surprise that all of those videos are made entirely with AI. So, while everyone else is freaking out that YouTube is banning AI, those who actually know how to use it generate results like this, this, or this. And here's the simple trick. YouTube is banning channels that has AI as a core foundation of everything [music] that they do. But if you use your brain to actually verify everything that AI does for you, and you only use it for manual boring tasks, YouTube is actually going to reward you with lots of views. In July, I'm hosting a three-day live event where I'll personally help you find a niche like this, so you can start a channel within 72 hours following my proven strategies. I got many more reasons for you to sign up, which [music] I don't want to waste time talking about, so just comment boundary and I'll get you the link.
